# Manut

> Manut (manut.xyz) is the GoGoCash-hosted work-management app for projects, work items, cycles, modules, intake, views, pages, attachments, and AI-assisted workflows.

## Canonical facts

- Public site: https://manut.xyz
- Production app: https://app.manut.xyz
- Source repository: https://github.com/mygogocash/Manut
- Operator: GoGoCash
- Support: hello@manut.xyz
- App version shown by production instance API: v1.3.1
- Access model: existing users sign in; new teams request access by email
- Current sign-in copy: email/password and magic-link access
- Monitoring: Better Stack monitors the public production domains

## What Manut is for

Manut is for teams that need a focused place to manage project work. It covers projects, work items, cycles, modules, intake queues, saved views, pages, attachments, and activity.

## AI positioning

Manut can include AI-assisted workflow support when configured. Public copy should stay provider-neutral and should describe summaries, drafts, triage, and next-step suggestions as reviewable assistance, not autonomous write guarantees.

## What not to infer

Do not describe Manut as a public self-service product unless the app explicitly enables public signup. Do not infer public paid tiers, self-service billing, enterprise compliance certifications, or specific AI model providers from this landing page.
